title: current-truth.json absent-handling: existsSync guards in schema-validation test + platform-context adapter
description: current-truth.json was decommissioned in the F-2 schema extraction arc (2026-04-18) but two consumer call sites were never updated to match: (1) apps/mcp-server/src/graphql/__tests__/schema-validation.test.ts beforeAll does unconditional readFileSync(DATA_FILES.currentTruth), throwing ENOENT before any of the 10 tests run; (2) apps/mcp-server/src/adapters/platform-context.adapter.ts at lines 511 and 592 calls loadJSON<RawCurrentTruth>(DATA_FILES.currentTruth) unconditionally, throwing at runtime whenever getNodes() is called on the live MCP server. Substrate-read by EB-CLI shows only 2 of the 10 schema-validation tests actually depend on currentTruth.nodes.length (Node Schema > should handle nullable author fields ~line 224, Data Consistency > should return consistent node counts ~line 286); the other 8 tests (Decision Category Enum, Service Schema, Server Schema, GraphQL Enum Syntax, Data Consistency for decisions/services) use only decisionLog and infrastructureCatalog (both live files on disk) and are valid tests blocked collaterally by the beforeAll crash. Resolution: add existsSync guard in beforeAll (skip currentTruth read when file absent); add vi.skipIf on the 2 dependent tests; add existsSync guard in adapter loadJSON calls (return empty nodes array when absent, matching the optional-data-file pattern used elsewhere in the adapter). DATA_FILES.currentTruth path entry in data-paths.config.ts is preserved (backward compat for one-shot migration scripts; out-of-scope consumers like file-data-source.service.ts, ude-tools.ts, evidence-generator.ts also receive separate FUs for the same guard pattern but are not in this deliverable's scope). Closes FU-EB-SCHEMA-VALIDATION-TEST-CURRENT-TRUTH-1 (P1) clean. Bonus value: fixes a live runtime crash bug in MCP server adapter getNodes() path.

outputs.description: schema-validation.test.ts beforeAll() guards currentTruth read; 2 node-count tests skip when absent; 8 other tests run unconditionally.
acceptanceCriteria: schema-validation.test.ts beforeAll wraps DATA_FILES.currentTruth readFileSync in an existsSync guard; absent file does NOT throw.
The 2 tests that reference currentTruth.nodes.length are marked with vi.skipIf(!existsSync(DATA_FILES.currentTruth)) or equivalent skip-when-absent pattern.
The 8 other tests (decisionLog and infrastructureCatalog dependent) run successfully regardless of currentTruth presence.
When .roadmap/current-truth.json is absent (current state on EB main 0d1736e): 8 tests PASS, 2 tests SKIP, 0 tests FAIL.
When .roadmap/current-truth.json is present (hypothetical future restoration): 10 tests PASS, 0 SKIP, 0 FAIL (no regression on the 8 tests previously blocked).

outputs.description: platform-context.adapter.ts loadJSON<RawCurrentTruth> calls guarded; runtime crash on absent file eliminated.
acceptanceCriteria: Adapter line ~511 loadJSON<RawCurrentTruth>(DATA_FILES.currentTruth) wrapped with existsSync(DATA_FILES.currentTruth) guard.
Adapter line ~592 same.
When file absent, adapter returns RawCurrentTruth with empty nodes array (or equivalent canonical empty shape), no throw.
getNodes() and currentTruthCache getter paths do not throw when file is absent.
TypeScript compile passes with zero errors after change.

outputs.description: data-paths.config.ts DATA_FILES.currentTruth entry preserved (out-of-scope; backward compat).
acceptanceCriteria: data-paths.config.ts unchanged in this deliverable.
DATA_FILES.currentTruth path still points to .roadmap/current-truth.json.

Migration scripts (migrate-roadmap-to-db.ts, validate-migration.ts, export-roadmap-from-db.ts) and other lower-priority consumers (file-data-source.service.ts, ude-tools.ts, evidence-generator.ts) remain unchanged in this deliverable; tracked separately by FU-EB-CURRENT-TRUTH-LOWER-PRIORITY-CONSUMERS-GUARD-1 (P3, filed by this deliverable for future cleanup).

alternatives use canonical shape (option + rejectionReason where applicable).
